CARD REWARD EVALUATION:
- Evolve (1E Power): Draw 1 card when a Status card enters hand. Useful against enemies that generate Status (Sentries/Dazed, Slime Boss/Slimed). But we already beat Slime Boss. In Act 2, Book of Stabbing generates Wounds. Evolve turns Wounds into draws. HOWEVER - we have Corruption+FNP engine. With Corruption, Skills exhaust on play. Evolve is a Power so it stays. Status cards drawn get exhausted if they're Skills... but Wounds/Dazed/Burns are NOT Skills. Evolve would help draw through them. Decent but not critical.

- Rampage (1E Attack): Deals 8 damage, +5 each time played. Needs multiple plays to ramp. Our scaling comes from Strength (Brimstone, Spot Weakness) + Whirlwind/Reaper. Rampage doesn't synergize and adds deck bloat.

- Clothesline (2E Attack): 12 damage + 2 Weak. We already have Shockwave for mass Weak+Vuln. Clothesline is single-target Weak at 2E. We have limited Weak sources (only Shockwave which exhausts), so another Weak source has marginal value. But 2E is expensive.

DECISION: All three are mediocre for our deck. Our deck is tight and well-built. Adding cards increases deck size and dilutes our key draws (Corruption+, FNP, Reaper, Whirlwind, Spot Weakness, Shockwave, Disarm).

SKIP. A tight deck draws its key cards more reliably. None of these solve a problem we have.

FIGHT STRATEGY - The Champ. FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely to kill faster). HP: 420 at A5. Anger transition at 210 HP (50%). Post-Anger: gains +9 Str (A4 value, may be +10 at A5) plus +2 per Gloat from Phase 1, clears ALL debuffs, gains Metallicize 5. Phase 1 plan: Deal damage to get below 210. Do NOT use Shockwave+ or Disarm (wasted by Anger). Do NOT use Reaper until Phase 2 (he has most Str then, max healing). Phase 2 plan: Immediately Shockwave+ (3 turns Weak+Vuln), Disarm (-2 Str), Strength Potion for burst, Reaper for big heal. Blessing of the Forge upgrades all cards in hand - use Turn 1 to upgrade opening hand. Power Potion could give any Ironclad power. TURN 1: Incoming 19. Hand: Defend(1E), Seeing Red(1E exhaust), Heavy Blade+(2E), FNP+(1E), Burning Pact(1E), Shrug It Off(1E), Spot Weakness(1E). Brimstone: +2 Str to me, +1 Str to Champ each turn. Current Str: 2 (me), 1 (Champ). First, use Blessing of the Forge to upgrade all cards in hand. Then plan plays. With 3E: FNP+ is critical - play it first (its a Power, no Nob concern). Spot Weakness: Champ is attacking -> +3 Str (or +4 if upgraded by Blessing). Seeing Red: +2E exhaust -> triggers FNP+ for 4 block. Then I have 4E. Heavy Blade+ at high Str is massive. Wait - lets think about Blessing first. Blessing upgrades ALL cards in hand. Upgrades: Defend->Defend+(8 block), Seeing Red->Seeing Red+(0E), HB+ already upgraded, FNP+ already upgraded, Burning Pact->Burning Pact+(draw 3 instead of 2), Shrug It Off->Shrug It Off+(11 block), Spot Weakness->Spot Weakness+(+4 Str). Seeing Red+ becomes 0E cost! And Spot Weakness+ gives +4 Str. Excellent. Play order: 1) Blessing of the Forge (potion, upgrades hand). 2) FNP+ (1E, Power). 3) Spot Weakness+ (1E, +4 Str, Champ IS attacking -> Str goes to 2+4=6). Wait Brimstone already gave +2 at turn start so I am at 2 Str. Spot Weakness+ gives +4 -> 6 Str. 4) Seeing Red+ (0E, +2E, exhaust -> FNP+ triggers 4 block). Now at 4E. 5) Defend+ (1E, 8+1dex=9 block). 6) Heavy Blade+ (2E, at 6 Str: 14 + 6*5 = 44 damage). 7) Shrug It Off+ or Burning Pact+? SIO+ gives 11+1=12 block and draws. BP+ exhausts a card (FNP trigger) and draws 3. Total block so far: 4 (FNP from SR) + 9 (Defend+) = 13 vs 19 incoming. Need 6 more. SIO+ gives 12 block = 25 total, well over 19. But wait, I have 1E left after HB+ (started 3, SR+ gives +2 = 5, minus FNP 1 = 4, minus SW 1 = 3, minus Def 1 = 2, minus HB+ 2 = 0). Hmm let me recalculate. Start: 3E. Play FNP+ (1E) -> 2E. Play Spot Weakness+ (1E) -> 1E. Play Seeing Red+ (0E) -> 1E + 2E = 3E. Play Defend+ (1E) -> 2E. Play HB+ (2E) -> 0E. Now 0E with SIO+ and BP+ in hand. Cannot play either. Incoming 19. Block: 4 (FNP from SR exhaust) + 9 (Defend+) = 13 block. Take 6 damage. Thats acceptable for a boss fight. Actually wait - this is boss fight, HP spending is OK. But lets see if theres a better line. Alternative: Skip Defend+, use that 1E differently. FNP+(1E)->2E. SW+(1E)->1E. SR+(0E)->3E. HB+(2E)->1E. Now 1E with Defend+, SIO+, BP+ in hand. Play SIO+ (1E, 12 block, draw 1) -> 0E. Block: 4+12=16 vs 19. Take 3. Or play Defend+ for 9 block. 4+9=13 vs 19. Take 6. SIO+ is better (12 block + draw). But SIO+ draws a card which we cant play. Actually for this boss fight, the order FNP+ -> SW+ -> SR+ -> HB+ -> SIO+ uses all 3E (+2 from SR) and gives: 4 block (FNP from SR) + 12 block (SIO+) = 16 vs 19. Take 3 damage. Deal 44 damage. OR: FNP+ -> SW+ -> SR+ -> SIO+ -> ... SIO draws. Then play whatever was drawn if useful, then HB+. But SIO is a draw effect so must be last before end or use send(). Better approach: FNP+(1E)->2E. SW+(1E)->1E. SR+(0E, exhaust, FNP+4 block)->3E. SIO+(1E, 12 block, draw 1)->2E, 16 block. Drawn card could be useful. Then HB+(2E)->0E. This works! 16 block vs 19, take 3. Deal 44. But SIO draws - must play via send then check. Actually in turn() batches with card names, draw effects should be last. Lets do: turn([play FNP+, play Spot Weakness+ 0, play Seeing Red+, play Heavy Blade+ 0, play Shrug It Off+, end]). Wait HB+ costs 2E. After FNP(1)+SW(1)+SR(0,+2E)=3E, HB+(2)=1E, SIO+(1)=0E. Total block: 4(FNP)+12(SIO)=16. But SIO draws - cannot have end after it in batch. Must send SIO separately. Better plan: Potion first (Blessing), then turn with non-draw cards, then send SIO, then end. Lets also consider Burning Pact+: exhaust a card from hand (choose one) + draw 3 + FNP trigger. If I play BP+ instead of SIO+, I exhaust Defend+ (triggers FNP +4 block) and draw 3. Thats 4+4=8 block from FNP triggers, but no block card. Versus SIO which gives 12 block + draw 1. SIO is better for block. Final plan: 1) Use Blessing of the Forge potion. 2) Play FNP+ (1E). 3) Play Spot Weakness+ on Champ (1E). 4) Play Seeing Red+ (0E, exhaust, FNP +4 block). 5) Play Heavy Blade+ on Champ (2E). At 3E after SR, minus 2 for HB = 1E. 6) Send Shrug It Off+ (1E, 12 block, draw 1) - draw effect, play last via send. 7) Check drawn card, end turn. This gives: 4 (FNP from SR) + 12 (SIO+) = 16 block vs 19. Take 3 damage. Deal 44 to Champ (420->376). Good Turn 1.
